title: RekRoom Reload Arena/2025

{{DISPLAYTITLE:Reload Arena}} {{Infobox league |game=BGMI |liquipediatier=4 |name=Reload Arena |tickername=Reload Arena |shortname=Reload Arena |image=RekRoom Reload Arena allmode.png|imagedark=RekRoom Reload Arena allmode.png |icon=RekRoom Reload Arena allmode.png|icondarkmode=RekRoom Reload Arena allmode.png |type=Online |team_number=16 |organizer=RekRoom|organizer-link=https://www.instagram.com/rekroomofficial |sponsor= |mode=squads|perspective=tpp |localcurrency=inr|prizepool=700000 |country=India |sdate=2025-11-28 |edate=2025-11-30 |web= |facebook= |discord= |youtube=@Rek_Room |loco= |instagram=rekroomofficial }} '''Reload Arena''' is a BGMI tournament. ==About== ===Format=== * '''Pre Quarter:''''' November 20th - 21st, 2025 ** 64 teams, 2 matchdays. ** Teams are divided equally into 4 groups of 16. ** {{Bgcolortext|up|Top 12 team from each group (Total 48 teams)}} advance to Quarter Finals.
* '''Quarter Finals:''''' November 22nd - 24th, 2025 ** 48 teams, 3 matchdays. ** Teams are divided equally into 3 groups of 16. ** {{Bgcolortext|up|Top 8 team from each group (Total 24 teams)}} advance to Semi Finals.
* '''Semi Finals:''''' November 26th - 27th, 2025 ** 24 teams, 2 matchdays. ** Teams are divided equally into 3 groups of 8. ** Round-robin format. ** {{Bgcolortext|up|Top 16 teams}} advance to the Grand Finals.
* '''Grand Finals:''''' November 28th - 30th, 2025 ** 16 teams, 3 matchdays. ** 18 matches (6 each day). ==Prize Pool== {{TeamPrizePool |{{Slot|localprize=250000|{{Opponent|Welt Esports}} }}
